newsSinceJun6: No genuinely new material news strictly after June 6. The June 3 FAW Toyota 500,000-unit digital-lidar design win recirculated in trade press on June 8 (Gasgoo), but it predates the window and was in yesterday's information set. Backdrop remains the late-May Q1 2026 print: robotics lidar shipments +1,458.8% YoY to 185,500 units, surpassing ADAS shipments for the first time, total shipments 330,300 (+204% YoY), ADAS backlog >9M units. Today's -0.83% move is noise.

sources.label: CnEVPost - RoboSense wins another 500,000-unit LiDAR order from FAW Toyota (Jun 3)
Gasgoo - RoboSense secures new FAW Toyota LiDAR program (recirculated Jun 8)
PR Newswire - RoboSense Q1 2026 robotics lidar +1,458.8% YoY, first quarter robotics > ADAS

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's hold stands: nothing genuinely new since June 6, and today's -0.83% changes no setup. On a robotics-alpha lens the asymmetry quietly improves at the margin - stock is -17% YTD while robotics lidar volume (185.5k units, now >ADAS mix) keeps validating the volume-leadership thesis - so a small positive drift (+1) without a rank change is right.
verdicts.bull: Robotics lidar shipments grew 1,458.8% YoY and overtook ADAS in Q1, a structural mix inflection, while a $1.9B cap and negative YTD mean the rerating hasn't happened; FAW Toyota's 500k-unit follow-on shows the cash-funding ADAS engine is also compounding.
verdicts.neutral: All the supporting evidence (Q1 volumes, FAW Toyota win) was known before June 6 and is partially reflected; robotics lidar ASPs are far below ADAS units, so revenue mix lags the headline unit surge.
verdicts.bear: Robotics lidar pricing is being commoditized fast (Hesai, Livox price war), Chinese humanoid/robot demand could prove inventory-driven rather than end-demand, and HK-listed small caps carry liquidity and geopolitical de-rating risk regardless of execution.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: H1 2026 results confirming robotics-segment revenue (not just units) inflecting with gross margin holding, or a named humanoid/robotaxi platform win at scale.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Lidar ASP erosion in robotics outpacing volume growth, compressing the revenue story behind the spectacular unit numbers.
